templates.description: Minimal article-class TikZ figure: imports arrows.meta, shapes.geometric, positioning, calc — use as a copy-paste starting point for any 2D TikZ diagram
Shapes, fills, and clipping: rectangles, circles, polygons, gradient fills, clip paths, scopes — use when drawing geometric shapes or filled regions
Arrow tips, decorations (zigzag, snake, brace, markings), dashed/dotted lines, path shortening, and styled connectors
